strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows at re:cinq
Strong open-source contributions and tooling development (GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: Resume uses inconsistent name (Szabo Bogdan) vs. candidate name (Aisha Okonkwo), raising red flag for authenticity
No explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or Kubernetes in work experience despite being required
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates deep full-stack expertise, strong open-source contributions, and direct AI-agent experience that aligns with core responsibilities. However, critical mismatches exist: the resume name doesn't match the candidate name, key required technologies (Nest.js, Vitest) are unmentioned, and German language skills are insufficient for enterprise collaboration. These concerns outweigh the strengths.
